checks.evidence: Recursive state uses .local/sys4ai/implementation-plan-relay/state.sqlite3 and contains no goals table.
Only the verified worker and receipt for N can reserve N+1.
Every recursive mutation recomputes and compares the website control fingerprint.
SQLite generation and receipt constraints plus consume-before-call tests enforce one task invocation.
Terminal plan state explicitly returns release_effects_authorized false.
Legacy coordinator data is read-only/default-disabled and requires coordinator_v2_legacy for mutation.
